expectations.evidence: Uses '推荐 A/B/C/D' lettered format instead of [1]-[4] numbered options. No user selection prompt at the end.

expectations.text: Recommendations account for custom check failures
expectations.evidence: Line 75: '两项自定义检查均通过' - mentions checks passed, factored into recommendations

expectations.text: Custom check results are integrated into the overall status report
expectations.evidence: Section 3: Dedicated table with check name, result, severity
Recommendations ordered by subjective importance (A/B/C/D) not by severity-based priority rules. No reference to RECOMMENDATION_RULES priority numbers.

expectations.text: Output provides actionable next steps, not just status
expectations.evidence: Each recommendation includes specific actions with git commands and estimated effort
